---
name: ui-page-builder
description: Use this skill when creating or updating a responsive website page, landing page, marketing page, or content-heavy UI section.
---

# UI Page Builder Skill

Use this skill when the task involves:
- building a new page
- creating landing page sections
- improving layout and structure
- making a page responsive
- adding forms, cards, grids, navbars, heroes, or content sections

## Objectives
- create clean, modern, responsive UI
- keep the page easy to scan
- support accessibility and semantic structure
- make components reusable where appropriate

## Page-building checklist
- mobile-first responsive layout
- semantic HTML structure
- clear heading hierarchy
- accessible buttons, links, and inputs
- consistent spacing
- reasonable component reuse
- no unnecessary wrapper nesting
- support for empty or fallback states where relevant

## Implementation guidance
- split large pages into reusable sections/components
- keep styling consistent
- prefer composition over monolithic page files
- use meaningful section names
- keep forms clear and accessible
- use reusable card, section, and layout patterns if available
- avoid inline complexity when a small helper/component improves clarity

## For content-heavy pages
Structure the page clearly, for example:
- hero
- supporting value section
- features/services grid
- testimonials or trust section
- FAQ
- CTA/footer

## Output expectations
When using this skill:
1. describe the page structure briefly
2. generate complete files
3. ensure the page is responsive
4. mention reusable components created
5. note any optional polish items separately

## Things to avoid
- inaccessible markup
- poor heading order
- duplicated layout code
- oversized page files when sections should be split
- desktop-only layouts
